pr.title: Autofinish #1371–#1372: route coverage for endpoint-inventar and error-budget
pr.body:
Advances the Autofinish loop by adding dedicated route coverage tests for two previously uncovered API routes and bumping the canonical iteration constants.

## Summary

- **#1371** — adds `src/tests/autofinish/autofinish-endpoint-inventar-route.test.ts` covering `/api/autofinish-endpoint-inventar`: verifies 200 status, `inventar`/`progres`/`ekosistem`/`autofinish` payload sections, and all item shapes
- **#1372** — adds `src/tests/autofinish/autofinish-error-budget-route.test.ts` covering `/api/autofinish-error-budget` (rate-limited `NextRequest` route): verifies 200 status, `servisi` array shapes, `Cache-Control`/`X-App-Version`/`X-Autofinish-Iteracija` response headers
- Constants bumped: `APP_VERSION` `59.40.0 → 59.42.0`, `AUTOFINISH_COUNT` `1370 → 1372`
- Pinned version/count assertions in all recent Autofinish test suites synced to new values
- Changelog entries appended in `src/lib/autofinish-petlja.ts`

## Billing Risk Assessment

- [ ] This PR touches billing/payment logic
- [ ] High-risk billing changes are present (webhook, checkout, replay, migrations)
- [ ] Security sign-off completed by code owner
- Security approver:

## Validation

- [x] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant billing endpoints tested

## Rollout Plan

- [ ] Feature flags configured
- [ ] Kill-switch fallback validated
- [ ] Monitoring/alerts updated
pr.author: Copilot
